plugin.name: format-boundary-spike
plugin.description: Copilot and Claude agent-format boundary probe.

agents.name: format-boundary-coordinator
agents.description: Coordinate the Copilot and Claude format-boundary probe by delegating the reference lookup to the terminal format-boundary-worker.

handoffs.label: Run the reference probe
handoffs.prompt: Load format-boundary-probe, follow its contract link, and report the marker with evidence.

agents.name: format-boundary-worker
agents.description: Terminal read-only worker for the format-boundary probe; loads the shared skill and follows its explicit contract reference.
